en.extract:
The rufous-cheeked tanager (Tangara rufigenis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae, the tanagers.
It is endemic to Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.


References

The '''rufous-cheeked tanager''' ('''''Tangara rufigenis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]], the [[tanager]]s.
It is [[endemic]] to [[Venezuela]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
